questions.question: Explain Azure Cloud Engineer Implementation Steps Part 2B to a junior developer.
questions.answer: Start with the problem it solves, show a simple example, explain core concepts, and discuss common mistakes.
questions.followUp: What mistakes do developers make with this?

questions.answer: Use Azure Cloud Engineer Implementation Steps Part 2B when you encounter the programming problem it addresses.
